title: Madrid Essentials
description: Everything you need before you arrive and during your stay — visas, money, getting around, staying safe.
bullets: Visas & entry — Schengen rules for US/UK/CA/AU; ETIAS launches Q4 2026 (currently not required)
Money — euros, ATMs, card acceptance, tipping etiquette, daily budgets
Getting around — Metro (12 lines, 300+ stations), EMT buses, taxi, ride-hailing, e-scooters
Spanish phrases — the 20 you'll actually use, from ¡hola! to ¿dónde está...?
Safety & emergencies — 112 emergency line, hospitals, embassies, police, lost passport

title: Living in Madrid
description: Settling in? Long-term tips for expats, students, digital nomads, and remote workers.
bullets: Finding a flat — idealista, fotocasa, neighborhood guide (Malasaña, Chamberí, Salamanca, Chueca, Lavapiés)
NIE, TIE & empadronamiento — the paperwork that unlocks everything else
Banking & taxes — Spanish bank accounts, NIE for contracts, Modelo 720 for overseas assets
Healthcare — public (Seguridad Social) vs private (Sanitas, Adeslas), how to register with a GP
Language, coworking & making friends — exchange nights, academies, meetup groups, hobby clubs

title: See in Madrid
description: Iconic landmarks, world-class museums, royal sites, and the green spaces Madrid is famous for.
bullets: The Golden Triangle — Museo del Prado, Museo Reina Sofía, Museo Nacional Thyssen-Bornemisza
Royal Madrid — Palacio Real, Catedral de la Almudena, and the Habsburg old town
Parks & green spaces — Retiro Park, Casa de Campo, Madrid Río, the Cable Car (Teleférico)
Architecture & plazas — Puerta del Sol, Plaza Mayor, Gran Vía, Templo de Debod, Barrio de las Letras
Day trips by train — Toledo (30 min), Segovia (35 min), Ávila (1h 10), El Escorial (1h)

title: Do in Madrid
description: Eat, drink, dance, shop, watch, play — what to actually do in the city after dark and after siesta.
bullets: Tapas & mercados — Mercado de San Miguel, La Latina, Barrio de las Letras, Malasaña crawls
Flamenco, jazz & live music — Tablao Villa Rosa, Cardamomo, Café Central, Teatro Real
Nightlife — Malasaña indie bars, Chueca cocktails, La Latina verbenas, Salamanca clubs
Football — Santiago Bernabéu (Real Madrid), Cívitas Metropolitano (Atlético), Vallecas (Rayo)
Traditions & shopping — Las Ventas bullfights (Mar–Oct), Sunday El Rastro flea, Gran Vía flagship stores

title: Madrid Now
description: What is happening in the city right now — this week, today, in the next hour.
bullets: This week's events — Veranos de la Villa (Jul 7 – Aug 30), verbenas de agosto, concerts, matches
Open exhibitions & pop-ups — what just opened at the Prado, Reina Sofía, Matadero, CaixaForum
Local news & city updates — strikes, protests, road closures, weather warnings
Live weather, time & AQI — current Madrid time, °C, air quality, sunset/sunrise
Transit alerts — Metro line closures (Lines 6, 7, 9B, 10 affected this summer), free shuttle buses
